visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap and glasses speaks directly into the camera. He wears a dark, cable-knit sweater. The background is a plain white wall. Yellow and orange text overlays appear at the bottom. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a person's hands holding a black smartphone with a large circular camera module. A separate, large black lens attachment is held nearby. The hands wear wooden bead bracelets. A cartoon cat graphic with a sweating expression appears over the hands, followed by cartoon eyes. (3) The man is now seen in a wider shot within a tech exhibition booth with a red background. He wears a blue sweatshirt with a brand logo and a backpack. He holds the smartphone and attaches the circular lens to it magnetically. (4) Close-up shots of the lens being snapped onto the back of the phone. The phone screen shows a camera interface capturing a crowd in a hall. Yellow subtitles persist at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 在小米發表會. (2) [Subtitle]: 我差點摔壞了鏡頭!!. (3) [Variety]: 救救... [Subtitle]: 欸 熱騰騰的. (4) [Subtitle]: 你看. [Subtitle]: 它是磁吸的. (5) [Subtitle]: 這是一款可磁吸. [Subtitle]: 用於手機外部外掛式的鏡頭相機. (6) [Subtitle]: 無需配對充電. [Subtitle]: 另外連結. (7) [Subtitle]: 欸 能即吸跟即用. (8) [Subtitle]: 那你有興趣嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, approximately 4 other individuals visible as passers-by in the background of the exhibition hall.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey flat cap, round-rimmed glasses, and a blue 'ROOTS' brand sweatshirt with a backpack.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts with a neutral white studio background and transitions to a high-tech exhibition hall with red walls, illuminated display pedestals, and technical text descriptions on the walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice introduces a topic quickly over an upbeat synth-driven background track. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a visual transition. (2) A comical, sliding cartoon whistle sound effect plays as the speaker makes a startled exclamation with high vocal arousal. (3) The speaker continues in a bright, friendly tone, explaining technical details with high speech density. The background music maintains a steady four-on-the-floor kick drum pattern. (4) A metallic 'click' or 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a point. The speaker asks a final question with a rising intonation. The track maintains a high spectral brightness throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and demonstrate the functionality of a new magnetic external lens accessory for a Xiaomi smartphone at a launch event, emphasizing its ease of use.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed demonstration of a specific brand's hardware features (Xiaomi magnetic lens) at an official event.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy tech-influencer style short video with heavy use of variety-show graphics and SFX to maintain engagement.
